profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Bank Ina Perdana Tbk provides general and digital banking products and services for individuals, MSMEs, and corporations in Indonesia. It operates through Marketing and Loans, Treasury, and Trade Finance segments. The company offers current and savings accounts; DHE SDA and foreign currency current accounts; margin and consumer fund depository bank segregated accounts; customer fund current and savings accounts; DHE SDA savings and foreign currency savings accounts; time deposits; DHE SDA deposits; foreign currency time and DHE deposits; digital savings accounts; and cash reward time deposits. It also provides ATM and debit cards; ATM and CRM machines; and education payment, cash withdrawal, priority customer, payment bank, and safe deposit box rental services. In addition, the company offers virtual accounts, electronic data capture, mobile banking, internet banking for individuals and businesses, Quick Response Code Indonesian Standard (QRIS) and debit acquiring, Binadigital application, Bina digital loans, loan channeling, Bina agent applications, API Binadigital, Bina cash advance loans, and Bina installment loans. Further, it provides micro/program, property ownership, multipurpose, motor vehicle, unsecured, commercial/corporate, and Indogrosir Red Member loans; people's business, small and medium enterprise, and home ownership credit products; investment products comprising bancassurance cooperation and mutual fund selling agent services; and gold investment services that allow customers to buy, sell, and transfer digital gold through the Binadigital application. Additionally, the company offers cash management services, such as payroll bank, fund transfer, margin fund accounts, and perception bank services; trade finance services, including import, export, bank guarantees, and document services; and custodian bank services. PT Bank Ina Perdana Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.
